ValidationRule.description: Checks for valid product combination data.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( Option__c=true, OR( ProjectManagementAllowancePackage__c =true, ExpenseAllowancePackage__c =true, SupplierCostsGroup__c =true, License__c=true, Intro__c=true, Outro__c=true ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Product can not be Option and of other kind. (QL008)
